query:
-- For the 505 services with billing items but no assignment, what billing item descriptions exist for their customers?
-- This tells us what the fuzzy match is failing on
SELECT 
  bi.description,
  s.serviceType,
  s.provider,
  COUNT(*) as service_count,
  SUM(s.monthlyCost) as total_cost
FROM services s
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.customerExternalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE s.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND s.status = 'active'
  AND (s.monthlyRevenue IS NULL OR s.monthlyRevenue = 0)
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM service_billing_assignments sba WHERE sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
  )
GROUP BY bi.description, s.serviceType, s.provider
ORDER BY total_cost DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- For the 505 services with billing items but no assignment, what billing item descriptions exist for their customers?
-- This tells us what the fuzzy match is failing on
SELECT 
  bi.description,
  s.serviceType,
  s.provider,
  COUNT(*) as service_count,
  SUM(s.monthlyCost) as total_cost
FROM services s
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.customerExternalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE s.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND s.status = 'active'
  AND (s.monthlyRevenue IS NULL OR s.monthlyRevenue = 0)
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM service_billing_assignments sba WHERE sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
  )
GROUP BY bi.description, s.serviceType, s.provider
ORDER BY total_cost DESC
LIMIT 20;
